description: Style NoteEvery item of clothing requires a different kind of innerwear to give the best comfort and the right look. enamor specialises in customised innerwear which will ensure a good overall look for you and lasting comfort throughout the day. And no need to compromise on the trendy look and style of your innerwear either, Enamor is your go to brand for the innerwear that takes care of all your requirements. Product DetailsGoldish beige, has a soft elasticated waistband, mid rise waist, elegant lace detailing and double layered gussetMaterial and Care78% nylon, 15% rayon and 7% spandexHand washDrip dry
